config.handheldMoon.title: Handheld Moon Settings
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.enab: Fixes flashlight beam position to reduce drift in third-person view.
Show flashlight beams for other players. In-game: hold '%s' and Right Mouse to toggle.
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.ligh: Maximum distance the flashlight cone can reach (in blocks).
The opening angle of the light cone (in degrees), controls beam width.
Provide one or more ARGB hex colors; multiple colors blend softly from apex to base.
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.enab: Enable dynamic real lighting. In-game: hold '%s' and Left Mouse to toggle.
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.real: Value 0–15; controls dynamic light brightness and effective coverage. Lower values reduce rebuild area to improve performance.
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.laye: List of per-layer size multipliers, e.g. 1.00,1.06,1.12…
List of per-layer center alpha values (0–1).
List of per-layer edge alpha values (0–1).
Optional per-layer colors. Leave empty to use palette with noise blending.
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.colo: Strength of irregular color wobble along the ring (0–1).
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.fog_: Adds a subtle outer fog layer for fuller look.
Size multiplier for the fog layer.
Fog color, e.g. 80FFFFFF for semi-transparent white.
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.ligh: Post-processing brightness multiplier. In-game: hold '%s' and scroll to adjust.
config.handheldMoon.client_settings.enab: Compute occlusion for beams. performance-sensitive, use with caution in complex terrain.
Clip cone to blocks via ray casts; improves realism but may jitter and impact performance.
